---
name: Data Source Request
about: Request support for a new data source or export format
title: "[Data] "
labels: data-source
assignees: ''
---

## Data source
What data source should be supported? (e.g., Azure export CSV, Billing API, Resource Graph, AWS CUR)

## Format
What format is the data in? (CSV, JSON, Parquet, API)

## Schema
Link to schema documentation or describe the columns/fields.

## Use case
Which report(s) would benefit from this data source?

## Priority
- [ ] Blocking — a report can't function without this
- [ ] Enhancement — improves accuracy or adds detail
- [ ] Nice to have

## Additional context
Links to docs, sample files, API references, etc.
